PowerShell($proc = Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Id -eq 9184 }; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id 9184 -Force; Write-Host "Killed 9184" } else { Write-Host "9184 not found" }; Start-Sleep 2; netstat -ano | Select-String ":8000 ")
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { try { $_.MainWindowTitle -ne $null } catch { $false } } | Select-Object Id, Name, StartTime | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq "python" } | Sort-Object StartTime)
